title: Workflow Configuration
description: Schema for GoCodeAlone/workflow engine YAML configuration files

imports.description: List of external config files to import

modules.description: List of module definitions to instantiate

dependsOn.description: List of module names this module depends on

name.description: Unique name for this module instance

delegate.description: Name of a service (implementing http.Handler) to delegate unmatched requests to

routes.description: Per-route processing pipelines with composable steps (validate, transform, http_call, etc.)

globalRateLimit.description: Global rate limit applied to all routes (requestsPerMinute, burstSize)

routes.description: Array of route definitions with pathPrefix, backend, methods, rateLimit, auth, timeout

fieldMapping.description: Custom field name mapping (e.g. id -> order_id, status -> state)

initialTransition.description: State transition to trigger after resource creation

resourceName.description: Name of the resource to manage (e.g. orders, users)

seedFile.description: Path to a JSON file with initial resource data

sourceResourceName.description: Alternative resource name to read from (for derived views)

stateFilter.description: Only show resources in this state

summaryFields.description: Field names to include in list/summary responses

transitionMap.description: Map of sub-action names to state transitions (e.g. approve -> approved)

workflowEngine.description: Name of the workflow engine service to use

workflowType.description: Workflow type for state machine operations

delegate.description: Name of a service (implementing http.Handler) to delegate unmatched requests to

routes.description: Per-route processing pipelines with composable steps (validate, transform, http_call, etc.)

allowRegistration.description: When true, any visitor may register without admin intervention

secret.description: Secret key for signing JWT tokens (supports $ENV_VAR expansion)

seedFile.description: Path to JSON file with initial user accounts

schema.description: Map of config key definitions with env, required, default, sensitive, desc fields

sources.description: Ordered list of config sources (later overrides earlier). Supported types: defaults, env

maxIdleConns.description: Maximum number of idle connections in the pool

maxOpenConns.description: Maximum number of open database connections

partitionKey.description: Column name used for partitioning in single-partition mode (e.g. tenant_id). Ignored when 'partitions' is set.

partitionNameFormat.description: Template for partition table names in single-partition mode. Supports {table} and {tenant} placeholders. Ignored when 'partitions' is set.

partitionType.description: PostgreSQL partition type for single-partition mode: list (FOR VALUES IN) or range (FOR VALUES FROM/TO). Ignored when 'partitions' is set.

partitions.description: List of independent partition key configurations. When set, overrides the single-partition fields. Each entry supports: partitionKey, tables, partitionType, partitionNameFormat, sourceTable, sourceColumn.

sourceColumn.description: Column in source table to query for tenant values in single-partition mode. Defaults to partitionKey.

sourceTable.description: Table containing all tenant IDs for auto-partition sync in single-partition mode. Ignored when 'partitions' is set.

tables.description: Tables to manage partitions for in single-partition mode. Ignored when 'partitions' is set.

maxIdleConns.description: Maximum number of idle connections in the pool

maxOpenConns.description: Maximum number of open database connections

max_retries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed messages

retention_days.description: Number of days to retain resolved/discarded DLQ entries

componentId.description: ID to look up in the dynamic component registry (defaults to module name)

requires.description: Service names this component depends on

source.description: Path to Go source file to load dynamically

db_path.description: Path to the SQLite database file for event storage

retention_days.description: Number of days to retain execution events

launchdarkly_sdk_key.description: LaunchDarkly server-side SDK key (required when provider is launchdarkly)

sse_enabled.description: Enable Server-Sent Events for real-time flag change notifications

store_path.description: Path for the flag definition store (file-based provider)

logLevel.description: Minimum log level for request logging

burstSize.description: Maximum burst of requests allowed above the rate limit

requestsPerMinute.description: Maximum number of requests per minute per client

frameOptions.description: Controls whether the page can be embedded in frames

hstsMaxAge.description: HTTP Strict Transport Security max-age in seconds

permissionsPolicy.description: Controls which browser features are allowed

referrerPolicy.description: Controls the Referer header sent with requests

targets.description: Map of URL prefix to backend URL (e.g. /api -> http://localhost:3000)

cache_ttl.description: How long to cache a valid license result before re-validating

grace_period.description: How long to allow operation when the license server is unreachable

license_key.description: License key (supports $ENV_VAR expansion; also reads WORKFLOW_LICENSE_KEY env var)

refresh_interval.description: How often the background goroutine re-validates the license

server_url.description: URL of the license validation server (leave empty for offline/starter mode)

retentionDays.description: Number of days to retain log entries

maxQueueSize.description: Maximum message queue size per topic

enabledMetrics.description: Which metric groups to register (workflow, http, module, active_workflows)

base_path.description: Base path prefix for all generated routes

max_body_bytes.description: Maximum allowed request body size in bytes for validated OpenAPI operations (leave empty to use module default)

register_routes.description: When false, skip registering spec-path routes (only serve spec endpoints and Swagger UI); default true

router.description: Name of the http.router module to register routes on (auto-detected if omitted)

spec_file.description: Path to the OpenAPI v3 spec file (JSON or YAML)

validation.description: Request/response validation settings, e.g. {"request": true, "response": false}

fieldMapping.description: Custom field name mapping between local workflow data and external API schemas

specFile.description: Local file path to the OpenAPI spec (JSON or YAML)

specUrl.description: URL to fetch the OpenAPI spec from

servers.description: List of server URLs to include in the spec

version.description: Version string for the OpenAPI spec

database.description: Name of the database module to use for storage

capabilities.description: Provider-agnostic capability properties (replicas, memory, ports, etc.)

constraints.description: Hard limits imposed by parent tiers

name.description: Unique identifier for this resource within its tier

tier.description: Which infrastructure tier this resource belongs to

type.description: Abstract capability type (e.g., container_runtime, database, message_queue)

compensateTransition.description: State transition to trigger on failure for compensation

componentId.description: Service name of the component to execute

retryBackoffMs.description: Base backoff duration in milliseconds between retries

successTransition.description: State transition to trigger on success

timeoutSeconds.description: Maximum execution time per attempt in seconds

accessKeyId.description: AWS access key ID (uses default credential chain if empty)

secretAccessKey.description: AWS secret access key (uses default credential chain if empty)

mountPath.description: KV v2 secrets engine mount path

cacheMaxAge.description: Cache-Control max-age in seconds for static assets

prefix.description: URL path prefix to serve files under

root.description: Path to the directory containing static files

router.description: Explicit router module name to register on (auto-detected if omitted)

spaFallback.description: When enabled, serves index.html for unmatched paths (for single-page apps)

provider.description: AI provider name (or 'auto' for registry default)

system_prompt.description: System prompt to guide the AI

schema.description: JSON schema defining the fields to extract

dest.description: Local file path to write the artifact to

execution_id.description: Execution ID to pull from (defaults to current execution)

key.description: Artifact key (required for previous_execution and s3 sources)

url.description: URL to download artifact from (required for url source)

key.description: Unique key for the artifact in the store

source_path.description: Local file path to read and push

allowed_types.description: Whitelist of allowed MIME types (e.g., ["image/jpeg", "image/png"]). Omit to allow all types.

format.description: Encoding format: 'data_uri' expects a data:mime/type;base64,... string; 'raw_base64' expects plain base64

input_from.description: Dotted path to the encoded data in the pipeline context (e.g., steps.upload.file_data)

max_size_bytes.description: Maximum allowed decoded size in bytes. 0 means unlimited.

validate_magic_bytes.description: When true, verifies the decoded content matches the MIME type claimed in the data-URI header

build_cmd.description: Build command to generate static assets

env.description: Extra environment variables for the build process

output_dir.description: Where to place built assets (for static.fileserver root)

cache.description: Name of the cache module to use

key.description: Cache key to delete (supports template expressions)

cache.description: Name of the cache module to use

miss_ok.description: If true, do not fail when the cache key is missing (default: true)

output.description: Context key to store the retrieved value

cache.description: Name of the cache module to use

value.description: Value to cache (supports template expressions, e.g. {{.field}})

success_threshold.description: Consecutive successes in half-open before closing

timeout.description: Time to wait before trying half-open

default.description: Step name to route to when no match is found

field.description: Field path to evaluate for routing

routes.description: Map of field values to target step names

constraints.description: List of constraint definitions (field, operator, value)

resources_from.description: Key in pipeline context containing resources to validate

partitionKey.description: Target a specific partition config by its partitionKey. Required when the database has multiple partition configs. Omit to use the primary (first) partition config.

tenantKey.description: Dot-path in pipeline context to resolve the tenant value (e.g. the new tenant's ID)

allow_dynamic_sql.description: When true, template expressions in 'query' are resolved at runtime. Each resolved value must contain only letters, digits, underscores and hyphens to prevent SQL injection.

database.description: Name of the database service (must implement DBProvider)

query.description: Parameterized SQL INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE statement (use ? for placeholders). Template expressions are forbidden unless allow_dynamic_sql is true.

tenantKey.description: Dot-path in pipeline context to resolve the tenant value for automatic scoping. Supported for UPDATE/DELETE only (requires database.partitioned)

allow_dynamic_sql.description: When true, template expressions in 'query' are resolved at runtime. Each resolved value must contain only letters, digits, underscores and hyphens to prevent SQL injection.

database.description: Name of the database service (must implement DBProvider)

mode.description: Result mode: 'list' returns rows/count, 'single' returns row/found

params.description: Template-resolved parameter values for ? placeholders in query

query.description: Parameterized SQL SELECT query (use ? for placeholders). Template expressions are forbidden unless allow_dynamic_sql is true.

tenantKey.description: Dot-path in pipeline context to resolve the tenant value for automatic scoping (requires database.partitioned)

allow_dynamic_sql.description: When true, template expressions in 'query' are resolved at runtime. Each resolved value must contain only letters, digits, and underscores to prevent SQL injection.

cache_key.description: Template-resolved key used to store/retrieve the cached result

cache_ttl.description: Duration string for how long to cache the result (e.g. '5m', '30s', '1h')

database.description: Name of the database service (must implement DBProvider)

mode.description: Result mode: 'single' returns row/found, 'list' returns rows/count

params.description: Template-resolved parameter values for query placeholders

query.description: Parameterized SQL SELECT query using $N placeholders (e.g. $1, $2); automatically converted to ? for SQLite drivers. Template expressions are forbidden unless allow_dynamic_sql is true.

scan_fields.description: Column names to include in the output (omit to include all columns)

database.description: Name of a database.partitioned service with sourceTable configured

partitionKey.description: Target a specific partition config by its partitionKey for syncing. Omit to sync all configured partition groups.

service.description: Name of the service to delegate to (must implement http.Handler)

health_check.description: Health check configuration (path, interval, timeout, thresholds)

broker.description: Name of the messaging broker module to use for replay (falls back to eventbus if not set)

dlq_topic.description: Dead letter topic name to replay messages from

max_messages.description: Maximum number of messages to replay

target_topic.description: Target topic to publish replayed messages to

broker.description: Optional name of the messaging broker module to use (falls back to eventbus if not set)

error.description: Optional error message or template expression containing the failure reason

original_topic.description: Optional name of the original topic the message came from

payload.description: Message payload to send to the DLQ (defaults to current pipeline context)

topic.description: Dead letter topic to publish failed messages to

cache_from.description: Images to use as cache sources

context.description: Path to the Docker build context directory

dockerfile.description: Path to Dockerfile relative to context

command.description: Command to execute in the container

wait_for_exit.description: Whether to wait for the container to exit

provider_service.description: Service name to look up the platform provider

resources_from.description: Key in pipeline context containing resources to check

broker.description: Name of the messaging broker module to use (falls back to eventbus if not set)

data.description: Alias for 'payload' — event data fields (supports template expressions)

headers.description: Additional headers/metadata to include with the event as a JSON object

payload.description: Event payload as a JSON object (supports template expressions); defaults to current pipeline context

provider.description: Alias for 'broker' — name of the EventPublisher or MessageBroker service (e.g., kinesis, bento-output)

source.description: CloudEvents source URI identifying the event producer (supports template expressions)

stream.description: Alias for 'topic' — name of the stream to publish to (e.g., Kinesis stream name)

topic.description: Topic or channel to publish the event to (also accepts 'stream' alias)

group_from.description: Template expression to extract group identifier from context

output_key.description: Key to store the flag value in pipeline context

user_from.description: Template expression to extract user identifier from context

group_from.description: Template expression to extract group identifier from context

on_disabled.description: Branch or step to execute when flag is disabled

on_enabled.description: Branch or step to execute when flag is enabled

user_from.description: Template expression to extract user identifier from context

collection.description: Dotted path to the collection to iterate over

index_key.description: Context variable name for the current index (defaults to 'index')

item_var.description: Context variable name for the current item (defaults to 'item')

step.description: Single step map to execute for each item (mutually exclusive with steps); must include 'type' key

steps.description: Array of step maps to execute for each item (mutually exclusive with step)

approvers.description: List of approver identifiers (for manual gates)

auto_approve_conditions.description: Conditions for automated approval (key.path == value format)

schedule.description: Time window for scheduled gates (weekdays, start_hour, end_hour)

timeout.description: Maximum time to wait for approval

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm: md5, sha256, or sha512

input.description: Input string to hash (template expressions supported)

body.description: Request body (supports templates). For POST/PUT without body, sends pipeline context.

oauth2.description: OAuth2 client_credentials configuration. Tokens are cached and refreshed automatically. Fields: grant_type (default: client_credentials), token_url, client_id, client_secret, scopes. When the token endpoint returns instance_url (Salesforce pattern), it is injected as {{ .instance_url }} for URL templates and included in the step output. If both the legacy auth block and oauth2 are configured, auth takes precedence and oauth2 is ignored.

url.description: Request URL (supports {{ .field }} templates; {{ .instance_url }} is available when OAuth2 client_credentials auth uses a token endpoint that returns instance_url)

backend_url_key.description: Dot-path in pc.Current for the backend URL (e.g. backend_url or steps.resolve.url)

forward_headers.description: Header names to copy from the original request to the proxy request

resource_key.description: Dot-path in pc.Current for the resource path suffix

expression.description: JQ expression to apply (supports full JQ syntax: field access, pipes, map, select, object construction, arithmetic, conditionals)

input_from.description: Dotted path to resolve input from (e.g., steps.fetch.data). Defaults to full pipeline context.

body.description: Response body as JSON (supports template expressions)

body_from.description: Dotted path to resolve body from step outputs (e.g., steps.get-company.row)

status.description: HTTP status code for the response

error_strategy.description: fail_fast: cancel on first error. collect_errors: run all, collect partial results.

steps.description: List of sub-steps to run concurrently. Each must have a unique 'name'.

plan_from.description: Key in pipeline context containing the plan to apply

provider_service.description: Service name to look up the platform provider
Service name to look up the platform provider

resources_from.description: Key in pipeline context containing resources to destroy

dry_run.description: If true, plan only without preparing for apply

provider_service.description: Service name to look up the platform provider

resources_from.description: Key in pipeline context containing resource declarations

template_name.description: Name of the template to resolve

template_version.description: Specific version to use (empty for latest)

broker.description: Message broker service name (optional, defaults to EventBus)

payload.description: Custom payload template (uses {{ .field }} expressions). Defaults to pipeline context.

key_from.description: Template for per-client rate limit key (e.g. {{.client_ip}})

input.description: Input string to match against (template expressions supported)

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern (compiled at config time)

parse_body.description: Whether to parse the JSON request body

path_params.description: Parameter names to extract from URL path (e.g., id, companyId)

query_params.description: Query string parameter names to extract

failure_threshold.description: Number of consecutive failures to open the circuit

fallback.description: Optional fallback step map executed when the circuit is open; must include 'type' key

reset_timeout.description: Duration the circuit remains open before attempting a half-open state

step.description: Sub-step map to protect; must include 'type' key with inline step configuration

multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the delay for each retry (exponential backoff factor)

step.description: Sub-step map to retry; must include 'type' key with inline step configuration

body_from.description: Dot-path to the base64-encoded binary data in the pipeline context (e.g. steps.parse.image_data)

content_type.description: Static MIME type for the uploaded object (e.g. image/png)

content_type_from.description: Dot-path to the MIME type in the pipeline context (takes precedence over content_type)

endpoint.description: Custom S3 endpoint URL for MinIO, LocalStack, or other S3-compatible storage (supports ${ENV_VAR} expansion). Leave empty for AWS.

key.description: S3 object key (supports {{ .field }} templates and {{ uuid }})

target_image.description: Docker image to scan for vulnerabilities

fail_on_severity.description: Minimum severity level to fail the gate

source_path.description: Path to source code to scan for dependencies

fail_on_severity.description: Minimum severity level to fail the gate

source_path.description: Path to source code to scan

values.description: Key-value pairs to set (values support {{ .field }} templates)

artifacts_out.description: Artifacts to collect after execution (array of {key, path})

env.description: Environment variables to set in the container

image.description: Docker image to run commands in

timeout.description: Maximum execution time for all commands

cache_control.description: Optional Cache-Control header value (e.g. public, max-age=3600)

content_type.description: MIME type of the file (e.g. application/yaml, text/html)

file.description: Path to the file to serve; resolved relative to the config file directory

input_mapping.description: Map of sub-workflow input keys to template expressions

output_mapping.description: Map of parent context keys to sub-workflow output paths

timeout.description: Maximum execution time for the sub-workflow

transformer.description: Name of a DataTransformer service to use

auth.description: Whether to generate authentication UI components

filename.description: Filename for the generated ZIP archive

theme.description: UI theme or design system to target

title.description: Title to use for the generated UI

theme.description: Visual theme or design system to target when generating scaffold analysis

title.description: Title to use for the generated scaffold analysis

required_fields.description: List of required field names (when strategy is required_fields)

schema.description: JSON Schema definition for validation (when strategy is json_schema)

default_limit.description: Default number of items to return when no limit is provided

default_page.description: Default page number when none is provided

max_limit.description: Maximum allowed number of items to return per request

format.description: Validation format to apply to each parameter (e.g. 'uuid')

params.description: List of path parameter names to validate

source.description: Dotted path within the context to read path parameters from (e.g. 'steps.parse-request.path_params')

required_fields.description: List of required top-level field names in the request body

header.description: HTTP header containing the signature (provider/legacy mode)

scheme.description: HMAC signature scheme to use (preferred over provider)

secret_from.description: Context key containing the secret at runtime (scheme mode only)

signature_header.description: HTTP header containing the signature (scheme mode only)

input.description: Map of target pipeline input keys to template expressions from the current context (e.g. {"conversation_id": "{{ .conversation_id }}"}). If omitted, all current context data is passed through.

mode.description: Execution mode: 'sync' waits for result, 'async' fires and returns immediately

output_mapping.description: Map of parent context keys to target pipeline output paths (e.g. {"assigned_responder": "responder_id"}). If omitted, all outputs are returned under 'result'.

timeout.description: Maximum execution time for the called workflow (applies to both sync and async modes)

workflow.description: Name of the target pipeline to call (must be registered in the same engine)

credentialsFile.description: Path to service account JSON key file

rootDir.description: Filesystem path for the storage root

dbPath.description: Path to the SQLite database file

maxConnections.description: Maximum number of open database connections

walMode.description: Enable Write-Ahead Logging for better concurrent read performance

event_store.description: Name of the event store service module to use

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts on failure

storageBackend.description: Name of a storage.sqlite module to share its DB connection (leave empty for standalone DB)

name.description: Step name (used to reference output in later steps)

provider.description: AI provider name (or 'auto' for registry default)

system_prompt.description: System prompt to guide the AI

schema.description: JSON schema defining the fields to extract

dest.description: Local file path to write the artifact to

key.description: Artifact key (required for previous_execution and s3 sources)

url.description: URL to download artifact from (required for url source)

key.description: Unique key for the artifact in the store

max_size_bytes.description: Maximum allowed decoded size in bytes. 0 means unlimited.

validate_magic_bytes.description: When true, verifies the decoded content matches the MIME type claimed in the data-URI header

If both the legacy auth block and oauth2 are configured, auth takes precedence and oauth2 is ignored.

url.description: Request URL (supports {{ .field }} templates; {{ .instance_url }} is available when OAuth2 client_credentials auth uses a token endpoint that returns instance_url)

backend_url_key.description: Dot-path in pc.Current for the backend URL (e.g. backend_url or steps.resolve.url)

forward_headers.description: Header names to copy from the original request to the proxy request

resource_key.description: Dot-path in pc.Current for the resource path suffix

expression.description: JQ expression to apply (supports full JQ syntax: field access, pipes, map, select, object construction, arithmetic, conditionals)

input_from.description: Dotted path to resolve input from (e.g., steps.fetch.data). Defaults to full pipeline context.

body.description: Response body as JSON (supports template expressions)

body_from.description: Dotted path to resolve body from step outputs (e.g., steps.get-company.row)

status.description: HTTP status code for the response

error_strategy.description: fail_fast: cancel on first error. collect_errors: run all, collect partial results.

steps.description: List of sub-steps to run concurrently. Each must have a unique 'name'.

plan_from.description: Key in pipeline context containing the plan to apply

provider_service.description: Service name to look up the platform provider
Service name to look up the platform provider

resources_from.description: Key in pipeline context containing resources to destroy

dry_run.description: If true, plan only without preparing for apply

provider_service.description: Service name to look up the platform provider

resources_from.description: Key in pipeline context containing resource declarations

template_name.description: Name of the template to resolve

template_version.description: Specific version to use (empty for latest)

broker.description: Message broker service name (optional, defaults to EventBus)

payload.description: Custom payload template (uses {{ .field }} expressions). Defaults to pipeline context.

key_from.description: Template for per-client rate limit key (e.g. {{.client_ip}})

input.description: Input string to match against (template expressions supported)

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern (compiled at config time)

parse_body.description: Whether to parse the JSON request body

path_params.description: Parameter names to extract from URL path (e.g., id, companyId)

query_params.description: Query string parameter names to extract

failure_threshold.description: Number of consecutive failures to open the circuit

fallback.description: Optional fallback step map executed when the circuit is open; must include 'type' key

reset_timeout.description: Duration the circuit remains open before attempting a half-open state

step.description: Sub-step map to protect; must include 'type' key with inline step configuration

multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the delay for each retry (exponential backoff factor)

step.description: Sub-step map to retry; must include 'type' key with inline step configuration

body_from.description: Dot-path to the base64-encoded binary data in the pipeline context (e.g. steps.parse.image_data)

content_type.description: Static MIME type for the uploaded object (e.g. image/png)

content_type_from.description: Dot-path to the MIME type in the pipeline context (takes precedence over content_type)

endpoint.description: Custom S3 endpoint URL for MinIO, LocalStack, or other S3-compatible storage (supports ${ENV_VAR} expansion). Leave empty for AWS.

key.description: S3 object key (supports {{ .field }} templates and {{ uuid }})

target_image.description: Docker image to scan for vulnerabilities

fail_on_severity.description: Minimum severity level to fail the gate

source_path.description: Path to source code to scan for dependencies

fail_on_severity.description: Minimum severity level to fail the gate

source_path.description: Path to source code to scan

values.description: Key-value pairs to set (values support {{ .field }} templates)

artifacts_out.description: Artifacts to collect after execution (array of {key, path})

env.description: Environment variables to set in the container

image.description: Docker image to run commands in

timeout.description: Maximum execution time for all commands

cache_control.description: Optional Cache-Control header value (e.g. public, max-age=3600)

content_type.description: MIME type of the file (e.g. application/yaml, text/html)

file.description: Path to the file to serve; resolved relative to the config file directory

input_mapping.description: Map of sub-workflow input keys to template expressions

output_mapping.description: Map of parent context keys to sub-workflow output paths

timeout.description: Maximum execution time for the sub-workflow

transformer.description: Name of a DataTransformer service to use

auth.description: Whether to generate authentication UI components

filename.description: Filename for the generated ZIP archive

theme.description: UI theme or design system to target

title.description: Title to use for the generated UI

theme.description: Visual theme or design system to target when generating scaffold analysis

title.description: Title to use for the generated scaffold analysis

required_fields.description: List of required field names (when strategy is required_fields)

schema.description: JSON Schema definition for validation (when strategy is json_schema)

default_limit.description: Default number of items to return when no limit is provided

default_page.description: Default page number when none is provided

max_limit.description: Maximum allowed number of items to return per request

format.description: Validation format to apply to each parameter (e.g. 'uuid')

params.description: List of path parameter names to validate

source.description: Dotted path within the context to read path parameters from (e.g. 'steps.parse-request.path_params')

required_fields.description: List of required top-level field names in the request body

header.description: HTTP header containing the signature (provider/legacy mode)

scheme.description: HMAC signature scheme to use (preferred over provider)

secret_from.description: Context key containing the secret at runtime (scheme mode only)

signature_header.description: HTTP header containing the signature (scheme mode only)

input.description: Map of target pipeline input keys to template expressions from the current context (e.g. {"conversation_id": "{{ .conversation_id }}"}). If omitted, all current context data is passed through.

mode.description: Execution mode: 'sync' waits for result, 'async' fires and returns immediately

output_mapping.description: Map of parent context keys to target pipeline output paths (e.g. {"assigned_responder": "responder_id"}). If omitted, all outputs are returned under 'result'.

timeout.description: Maximum execution time for the called workflow (applies to both sync and async modes)

workflow.description: Name of the target pipeline to call (must be registered in the same engine)

trigger.description: Inline trigger definition for this pipeline

triggers.description: Trigger configurations keyed by trigger type

workflows.description: Workflow handler configurations keyed by workflow type (e.g. http, messaging, statemachine, scheduler, integration)
